seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with Haystack enables intelligent email processing through modular pipelines for intent detection, draft generation, and approval workflows. Guardrails are essential due to the high-risk nature of email handling, where errors can lead to PII leaks, inappropriate communications, or confidentiality breaches. Vex integration provides runtime verification to ensure reliability and compliance in production.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Email Assistant pipeline begins with an Email Parser component that extracts sender, recipient, subject, body, and attachments from incoming emails. This feeds into an Intent Detector using a text classifier to identify actions like 'reply', 'forward', 'draft', or 'archive'. A Router then directs to specialized sub-pipelines: the Reply Generator retrieves relevant context via RAG, generates drafts with an LLM, and applies PII filters; the Attachment Handler processes and validates files; and the Approval Workflow routes high-risk drafts for human review.

Verification occurs at multiple stages: post-retrieval relevance checks, pre-generation content filtering, and final output validation for tone, accuracy, and compliance. The pipeline outputs structured email actions with confidence scores, ensuring safe automation of email workflows.

This composable architecture leverages Haystack's DocumentStores, Retrievers, and Generators while integrating custom components for email-specific logic.

risks.name: PII Leakage in Generated Replies
risks.description: Generator includes sensitive data from retrieved context or email body in outgoing drafts
risks.mitigation: Vex PII filtering component scans all generated content before dispatch

risks.name: Inappropriate Tone Detection Failure
risks.description: Intent classifier or generator produces sarcastic/hostile language unsuitable for professional email
risks.mitigation: Multi-layer tone analysis with Vex sentiment and professionalism verification

risks.name: Invalid Recipient Forwarding
risks.description: Retriever suggests irrelevant contacts or generator fabricates email addresses
risks.mitigation: Recipient validation against verified contact lists with exact match requirements

risks.name: Hallucinated Content Beyond Context
risks.description: Generator fabricates facts not grounded in email thread or retrieved knowledge base
risks.mitigation: Vex context faithfulness checks with similarity thresholds on generated vs retrieved content

implementation.title: Email Intent Detection Pipeline
implementation.description: Core pipeline classifying email intent using Haystack's text classification

implementation.title: RAG Reply Generator with Context Retrieval
implementation.description: Retrieves relevant email history and generates context-grounded replies
implementation.code:
from haystack.components.retrievers.in_memory import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

rag_pipeline = Pipeline()

rag_pipeline.add_component(
    "retriever",
    InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store=doc_store, embeddable_document_types=[Document])
)

rag_pipeline.add_component(
    "prompt_builder",
    PromptBuilder(template="""Context: {{join(retriever.documents, delimiter_newline=True)}}
Email: {{email_text}}
Reply professionally:"""))

rag_pipeline.add_component(
    "generator",
    OpenAIGenerator(api_key="your-key", model="gpt-4o-mini")
)

rag_pipeline.connect("retriever", "prompt_builder.documents")
rag_pipeline.connect("prompt_builder", "generator")

implementation.title: Attachment Processing Component
implementation.description: Custom component for safe attachment extraction and virus scanning

implementation.title: Approval Workflow Router
implementation.description: Routes drafts to human approval based on confidence and risk scores
implementation.code:
from haystack.components.routers import PromptTemplateRouter
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

approval_router = Pipeline()

approval_router.add_component(
    "risk_assessor",
    PromptBuilder(template="""Draft: {{draft}}
Assess risk level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH):""")
)

approval_router.add_component(
    "router",
    PromptTemplateRouter([
        PromptTemplateRouter.Template(name="low_risk", template="send immediately"),
        PromptTemplateRouter.Template(name="medium_risk", template="manager review"),
        PromptTemplateRouter.Template(name="high_risk", template="executive approval")
    ])
)

approval_router.connect("risk_assessor", "router")
